title: IDF weeklong raid north of Litani River — Golani Brigade destroys 100+ targets, finds Hezbollah tunnels
snippet: IDF announced May 13 that Golani Brigade Reconnaissance Unit conducted weeklong raid north of Litani River near Zawtar al-Sharqiyah (~10km from border). Troops achieved 'operational control', destroyed 100+ military targets, found tunnel networks with weapon stockpiles and rocket launchers. First IDF crossing of Litani since ceasefire.
tag_reason: IDF Litani crossing disclosed 5/13, not previously reported
